summary: Complete end-to-end testing of Start Up 13 bilingual website - all core functionality working perfectly including language toggle, RTL support, contact form integration, and responsive design

design_issues.issue: Mobile hamburger menu toggle not clearly detected in testing, but navigation appears functional

passed_tests: Contact form submission and MongoDB storage
Arabic language support in backend API
Homepage loading with all sections visible
Contact form frontend integration with backend
Success message display after form submission
Mobile responsive design across all sections
Mobile language toggle and RTL support

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor mobile menu detection issue)
